name: Meat Pies Creole Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lean ground beef, pork, and veal.
2. Add hot water, salt, and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
3. Stir in the hot pepper sauce according to your preference.
4. Mix in minced onions and garlic cloves.
5. Incorporate chopped parsley and green onion tops.
6. Heat vegetable oil for deep-frying.
